---
title: "About Me"
toc: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-shell">
  <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-3 page-nav">
    <a class="btn btn-success btn-sm rounded-pill px-3" href="about.html">ℹ️ About Me</a>
    <a class="btn btn-outline-light btn-sm rounded-pill px-3" href="dashboard.html">📊 Hot 100 Chart</a>
    <a class="btn btn-outline-light btn-sm rounded-pill px-3" href="mood-of-the-week.html">🎧 Mood Snapshot</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<!-- This project is a learning exercise inspired by 
     Melissa Van Bussel's 2024 Posit Table Contest submission.
     Original dashboard structure and design patterns credited to her work:
     https://github.com/melissavanbussel/spotify-dashboard -->
```

:::::: {.page-shell}
::::: columns
::: {.column width="38%" style="text-align: center;"}
<img src="images/headshot.jpg" class="about-headshot">
:::

::: {.column width="62%"}
<big>

# Hi, I'm Mario

### Welcome to my project!

This dashboard is part of a personal learning end-to-end analytics project. It pulls from multiple APIs and walks through ingesting, cleaning, and analyzing real-time data.

The first page of this dashboard was inspired by **Melissa Van Bussel's 2024 Posit Table Contest submission**, which served as a template and educational reference.

The current version includes a lightweight data pipeline that refreshes Spotify Hot 100 track data, manages cache files for weekly updates, and enriches chart tracks with audio features for analysis-ready outputs. The mood page extends the project with audio-feature analysis and supporting visualizations.

If you'd like to connect, you can find me here:

::: {.about-contact}
- GitHub: [github.com/MariojReyes](https://github.com/MariojReyes)
- LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/marioreyesiii](https://linkedin.com/in/marioreyesiii)
:::

</big>
:::
:::::
::::::
